title: Pastel Ghast Harness
description: ✨ Recolors the new happy ghast harness with clean white leather and soft pastel tones for every dyeable option.
body:
![wide shot in the sky showing a bunch of floating happy ghasts wearing the retextured harness showcasing the color variants.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1acec816b7464d044b42bfc385e99c369658ff6e_0.webp)

🎀 Pastel Ghast Harness

Bring a gentle, aesthetic charm to the Nether with this visual upgrade for the new ghast harnesses. This pack replaces the default brown leather and bold colors with a white base and a full range of hand-picked pastel shades for all dye variants.

 

💖 Perfect for players who love:

- Soft or pastel aesthetics
- Color-coordinated mobs
- Matching with other pastel-themed packs

 

🎨 Included Colors:

- Pastel Pink
- Baby Blue
- Soft Lime
- Lavender Purple
- Pale Yellow
- Mint Green
- Peach Orange
- And more!

🧵 Features:

- White leather base replaces brown
- All dye options have unique pastel recolors
- Now available for 26.1 and above

Faces from 'Happy Ghast Redesign' by Avrok: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/happy-ghast-redesign](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/happy-ghast-redesign)


🎯 Resolution: 16x
